productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women's White Little Mousie T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic on the chest embellished with red, black and gingham bows FittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Slip into childhood memories with this white tee from the doodle collection of jealous 21. The doodle graphic on the front of the girl blowing bubbles with her pet mouse is at once surreal and magical.
